hero.line3: building products from ideation to launch
hero.description: 20+ years across product design, design leadership and brand-driven experiences

cap1.title: Product Leadership
cap1.description: Building and scaling products, teams and operational systems from concept to launch.

cap2.title: Product Strategy
cap2.description: Connecting user needs, business goals and execution.

cap3.title: Product Management
cap3.description: Transforming ideas into products through research, prioritization and strategic planning.

cap4.title: Brand Systems
cap4.description: Creating communication frameworks that help complex ideas become understandable and scalable.

cap5.title: Service & Business Design
cap5.description: Designing products beyond software through services, operations and business models.
